testSummary: Two cold-cache full runs (0 cached) both green: 30/30 turbo test tasks. New: @cdp/email 24 tests (incl. template-storage integration on real PG), @cdp/service-onboarding 38 tests (incl. 3 integration files on real PG). Phases 2-5 unchanged: segments 61, processor 50+1 skipped, ingest 22, authorizer 18, tenancy 41, api 17, batch-eval 11, db 13, tests 7. Integration tier RAN on localhost:5433.
notes: TDD. Activate gate = SES DKIM status NOT DNS, proven by decoupled mocks: DNS-all-found+SES-PENDING DENIES; SES-SUCCESS+required DNS pending DENIES; only SES-SUCCESS+required (SPF+MAIL FROM) resolved ALLOWS; DMARC recommended never required; dkimVerified derives from SES status. canSend false until status=active && sending_identity.verified=true. Every onboarding write binds workspace_id $1; activate UPDATE touches exactly one row (wsA activate never affects wsB). SES/DNS mocked everywhere (aws-sdk-client-mock + injected DnsResolver + SES-status reader); mjml real in compile tests; DB never mocked. Commits via reused runPlanInWorkspaceTx. email_templates no UNIQUE(workspace_id,name) in §6 so buildTemplateUpsert is idempotent UPDATE-then-INSERT-if-absent, workspace-scoped. mjml v4 ambient decl in tsconfig files. turbo cache:false. No source changes to phases 2-5.
